info.name: Meetzy API
info.description: Postman collection for Meetzy app вЂ” Auth Login, Profile Update, and Video Calling. Total: 6 requests.

item.name: 1. Auth вЂ” Login
item.description: Single endpoint handles all auth flows вЂ” new user, profile setup, and returning user. token_id is always required. All other fields are optional. Flutter navigates based on isProfileComplete in the response.

request.description: Checks if a user already exists in the database by verifying their Google ID token.

exec: console.log('isProfileComplete: true в†’ Flutter goes to Home Screen');
console.log('isProfileComplete: false в†’ Flutter shows Profile Setup Screen');

request.description:
One API for all Flutter auth scenarios. token_id is always required. All other fields are optional.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
USAGE GUIDE
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Scenario A вЂ” Login Screen (new or returning):
Send only token_id. Remove all other fields.
в†’ New user:       isProfileComplete: false в†’ show Profile Setup Screen
в†’ Returning user: isProfileComplete: true  в†’ go to Home Screen

Scenario B вЂ” Profile Setup Screen:
Send token_id + display_name + gender + country_name + country_code.
в†’ Backend saves profile, isProfileComplete: true в†’ go to Home Screen

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
FLUTTER NAVIGATION RULE
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
if (res.data.user.isProfileComplete == false) в†’ Profile Setup Screen
if (res.data.user.isProfileComplete == true)  в†’ Home Screen

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
EXPECTED RESPONSE
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "isNewUser": true,
  "message": "Login successful",
  "data": {
    "accessToken": "eyJhbG...",
    "refreshToken": "eyJhbG...",
    "expiresIn": 604800,
    "user": {
      "id": 1,
      "email": "nirav@gmail.com",
      "displayName": "John Doe",
      "photoUrl": "https://...",
      "gender": "male",
      "countryName": "India",
      "countryCode": "IN",
      "isVip": false,
      "isOnline": true,
      "isProfileComplete": false,
      "walletBalance": 0,
      "createdAt": "2026-06-01T00:00:00.000Z"
    }
  }
}
```
Logs out the current user, invalidates the access token in Redis, and sets their online status to false.

item.name: 2. Profile Update
item.description: Use GET first to load current data, then PATCH to send only the fields that changed. All PATCH fields are optional.

request.description:
Returns the full profile of the currently logged-in user.

Note: Response is a raw object вЂ” no success wrapper.

```json
{
  "id": 1,
  "displayName": "Nirav V",
  "bio": "Software Developer | Video chat enthusiast",
  "photoUrl": "https://...",
  "countryId": 5,
  "countryName": "India",
  "countryCode": "IN",
  "gender": "male",
  "isVip": false,
  "isOnline": true,
  "isProfileComplete": true,
  "coins": 0,
  "photos": [],
  "wallet": { "balance": 0, "currency": "coins" },
  "createdAt": "2026-06-01T00:00:00.000Z",
  "updatedAt": "2026-06-01T00:00:00.000Z"
}
```

Updates user profile. All fields are optional вЂ” send only what changed.
Returns the updated User object (no success wrapper).

query.description: Optional: number of users to fetch

request.description:
Returns a randomized list of active online users for the radar home screen.

Filters:
- gender=all (Default): returns 80% female and 20% male, shuffled randomly.
- gender=female: returns only females.
- gender=male: returns only males.
Purges the authenticated user account and all of their related transactional data, photos, gifts, messages, and calls from both the MySQL database and Redis states.

item.name: 3. Video Calling
item.description:
Video calling uses 1 HTTP route + 2 WebSocket namespaces.

HTTP: GET /users/:id вЂ” loads partner info on call screen.
WebSocket /matchmaking вЂ” finding, ringing, accepting, skipping.
WebSocket /call вЂ” join room, WebRTC SDP/ICE relay, end or skip call.

request.description:
Loads partner's public info (name, photo, country, gender) to show on the call screen overlay.
Set the `partnerId` collection variable to the partner's user ID before running.

item.name: вљЎ WS /matchmaking вЂ” How To Connect

request.description:
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ WEBSOCKET вЂ” NOT A REST API в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ

Namespace: /matchmaking
Handles: finding users, ringing, accepting, declining, cancelling, skipping.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
HOW TO TEST IN POSTMAN
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
1. Click New в†’ WebSocket Request
2. URL: ws://localhost:3001/matchmaking
3. Headers в†’ add:  Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
4. Click Connect

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
EVENTS TO SEND: FLUTTER в†’ BACKEND
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

в–є match:findUser  (User A clicks Connect button вЂ” no body)
в†’ Backend picks a random available user (User B)
в†’ User B receives в—„ match:incomingCall
в†’ User A receives в—„ match:calling

в–є match:acceptCall  (User B taps Accept)
{ "callId": "uuid" }
в†’ Both receive в—„ match:callAccepted with roomId

в–є match:declineCall  (User B taps Decline)
{ "callId": "uuid" }
в†’ User A receives в—„ match:callDeclined

в–є match:cancelCall  (User A cancels before B responds)
{ "callId": "uuid" }
в†’ User B popup dismissed в—„ match:callCancelled

в–є match:next  (after call:skipConfirmed вЂ” find next user)
(no body)
в†’ Immediately finds another random user to ring

в–є match:backToAvailable  (after call ends, re-enter pool)
(no body)

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
EVENTS RECEIVED: BACKEND в†’ FLUTTER
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

в—„ match:incomingCall  (to callee User B)
{
  "callId": "uuid",
  "caller": {
    "id": 1,
    "displayName": "John",
    "photoUrl": "https://...",
    "bio": "...",
    "gender": "male",
    "country": { "name": "India", "code": "IN" }
  }
}

в—„ match:calling  (to caller User A)
{
  "callId": "uuid",
  "calleeId": 2
}

в—„ match:callAccepted  (to BOTH users)
{
  "roomId": "uuid-room-id",
  "partnerId": 2,
  "iceServers": [
    { "urls": "stun:stun.l.google.com:19302" },
    { "urls": "turn:...", "username": "meetzy", "credential": "..." }
  ]
}
в†’ Save roomId в†’ connect to /call WebSocket

в—„ match:callDeclined   { "message": "User declined your call" }
в—„ match:callCancelled  { "callId": "uuid" }
в—„ match:callExpired    { "message": "Call request expired or cancelled" }
в—„ match:noUsersAvailable  { "message": "No users are available right now." }
в—„ match:partnerLeft    { "roomId": "uuid" }  в†ђ partner disconnected

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ WEBSOCKET вЂ” NOT A REST API в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ

Namespace: /call
Handles: joining a room, WebRTC SDP/ICE relay, ending or skipping a call.
Backend does NOT process video вЂ” only relays SDP and ICE signals between peers.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
HOW TO TEST IN POSTMAN
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
1. Click New в†’ WebSocket Request
2. URL: ws://localhost:3001/call
3. Headers в†’ add:  Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
4. Click Connect

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
EVENTS TO SEND: FLUTTER в†’ BACKEND
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

в–є call:join  (send immediately after match:callAccepted)
{ "roomId": "{{roomId}}" }
в†’ When both users joined:
в†’ User A в—„ call:ready { isInitiator: true  } вЂ” creates SDP offer
в†’ User B в—„ call:ready { isInitiator: false } вЂ” waits for offer

в–є call:sdpOffer  (User A sends, isInitiator only)
{
  "roomId": "{{roomId}}",
  "sdp": { "type": "offer", "sdp": "v=0\r\no=- ..." }
}
в†’ Relayed to User B  в—„ call:sdpOffer

в–є call:sdpAnswer  (User B sends after receiving offer)
{
  "roomId": "{{roomId}}",
  "sdp": { "type": "answer", "sdp": "v=0\r\no=- ..." }
}
в†’ Relayed to User A  в—„ call:sdpAnswer

в–є call:iceCandidate  (both users send, multiple times)
{
  "roomId": "{{roomId}}",
  "candidate": {
    "candidate": "candidate:123...",
    "sdpMid": "0",
    "sdpMLineIndex": 0
  }
}
в†’ Relayed to other user  в—„ call:iceCandidate
в†’ WebRTC peer connected вЂ” video starts

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
ENDING THE CALL
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

в–є call:end  (End Call button pressed)
{ "roomId": "{{roomId}}" }
в†’ BOTH users receive в—„ call:ended
в†’ BOTH navigate to Home Screen
в†’ Duration saved to MySQL
в†’ No one is auto re-queued

в–є call:skip  (Swipe right-to-left)
{ "roomId": "{{roomId}}" }
в†’ Skipped user  в—„ call:skipped  в†’ goes to Home Screen
в†’ Swiping user  в—„ call:skipConfirmed
в†’ Swiping user then sends match:next on /matchmaking
в†’ Backend rings another random user

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
EVENTS RECEIVED: BACKEND в†’ FLUTTER
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

в—„ call:ready
{ "roomId": "uuid", "isInitiator": true }

в—„ call:sdpOffer   { "from": 1, "sdp": { ... } }
в—„ call:sdpAnswer  { "from": 2, "sdp": { ... } }
в—„ call:iceCandidate  { "from": 1, "candidate": { ... } }

в—„ call:ended
{ "by": 1, "roomId": "uuid", "reason": "ended_by_user" }

в—„ call:skipped
{ "by": 1, "roomId": "uuid", "message": "Your partner skipped to the next user" }

в—„ call:skipConfirmed
{ "roomId": "uuid" }

в—„ call:error  { "message": "Room not found" }
в—„ call:ended  { "by": 1, "roomId": "uuid", "reason": "partner_disconnected" }

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
FULL SEQUENCE SUMMARY
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
1.  /matchmaking: A в†’ match:findUser
2.  /matchmaking: B в†ђ match:incomingCall
3.  /matchmaking: B в†’ match:acceptCall
4.  /matchmaking: Both в†ђ match:callAccepted { roomId }
5.  /call:        Both connect and в†’ call:join { roomId }
6.  /call:        A в†ђ call:ready { isInitiator: true }
               B в†ђ call:ready { isInitiator: false }
7.  /call:        A в†’ call:sdpOffer
8.  /call:        B в†ђ call:sdpOffer
9.  /call:        B в†’ call:sdpAnswer
10. /call:        A в†ђ call:sdpAnswer
11. /call:        Both в†” call:iceCandidate (multiple)
12. WebRTC connected вЂ” video starts

End call:  в†’ call:end   в†’ both в†ђ call:ended  в†’ Home Screen
Swipe next: в†’ call:skip в†’ skipped в†ђ call:skipped в†’ Home Screen
                         swiping в†ђ call:skipConfirmed
                         swiping в†’ match:next в†’ rings next user
